item.title: Her Mother Finally Knows Who Took Her Daughter's Life
item.description: This video explores a mother’s long journey for answers, revealing the investigation and the moment she finally learns the truth about her daughter’s death.

media:content.media:title: Her Mother Finally Knows Who Took Her Daughter's Life
media:content.media:description: This video explores a mother’s long journey for answers, revealing the investigation and the moment she finally learns the truth about her daughter’s death.

item.title: The Chilling Case of Stefanie Damron: What Happened in the Woods?
item.description: Explore the case of Stefanie Damron, reviewing the events in the woods, the investigation, and the unanswered questions surrounding this tragic story.

media:content.media:title: The Chilling Case of Stefanie Damron: What Happened in the Woods?
media:content.media:description: Explore the case of Stefanie Damron, reviewing the events in the woods, the investigation, and the unanswered questions surrounding this tragic story.

item.title: The Keddie Murders The Mystery No One Can Forget
item.description: The Keddie murders remain one of California’s most haunting unsolved cases, leaving a lasting impact on the community and continuing to puzzle investigators.

media:content.media:title: The Keddie Murders The Mystery No One Can Forget
media:content.media:description: The Keddie murders remain one of California’s most haunting unsolved cases, leaving a lasting impact on the community and continuing to puzzle investigators.

item.title: This Decades Long Mystery Was Solved By A 13-Year-Old!
item.description: The story of how a 13-year-old helped uncover the truth behind a mystery that had remained unsolved for decades.

media:content.media:title: This Decades Long Mystery Was Solved By A 13-Year-Old!
media:content.media:description: The story of how a 13-year-old helped uncover the truth behind a mystery that had remained unsolved for decades.

item.title: The Chilling Mystery of Debra Frost
item.description: A closer look at the case of Debra Frost, examining the events, investigation, and the questions that continue to surround her story.

media:content.media:description: A closer look at the case of Debra Frost, examining the events, investigation, and the questions that continue to surround her story.
